title: Data Analyst
description:
12‑month Fixed Term Contract
Hybrid – London / Remote
We’re recruiting a
Data Analytics Analyst
to join a high‑performing Finance Transformation team, supporting the automation and optimisation of data‑driven processes across finance and tax.
This role is
analytics‑led, not tax‑led
. You’ll use your technical expertise to build smart, scalable workflows and dashboards, while working closely with tax and finance subject‑matter experts who provide domain guidance.
If you enjoy turning complex, manual processes into efficient, automated solutions, this role will suit you well.
What you’ll be doing
Partner with Finance and Tax stakeholders to understand existing processes and pain points
Translate business requirements into
automated workflows and analytics solutions
Build, enhance and maintain data workflows using
Alteryx
Develop dashboards and reporting (e.g. Power BI) to improve visibility, controls and governance
Support the automation of reconciliation and reporting processes
Upload, manage and maintain workflows on
Alteryx Server
Own the tools you build — including documentation, training and handover to end users
Act as the technical expert on analytics solutions during change and transformation initiatives
Collaborate with external advisers (e.g. consulting partners) where specialist input is required
Tools & technology
Alteryx (essential)
– workflow development, automation and data transformation
Power BI and Excel for reporting and visualisation
Alteryx Server for workflow management and deployment
What we’re looking for
Essential:
Strong, hands‑on experience using
Alteryx
Alteryx certification (Designer Core minimum)
Ability to break down complex processes and data problems
Strong analytical and problem‑solving mindset
Confidence working with stakeholders to gather requirements
Nice to have (but not required):
Experience in financial services or insurance
Alteryx Server experience
Power BI or dashboarding experience
Experience with reconciliations or finance processes
Project or stakeholder management experience
